name: Eggplant-Macaroni Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling water, cook macaroni for 8-10 minutes, just until tender. Drain, and reserve 1/4 cup of the cooking liquid. Place the cooking liquid in a large bowl, stir in Parmesan cheese, scallions, olive oil, and pepper. Add macaroni, toss well to mix. Set aside.
2. Spray a large nonstick skillet with spray. Add eggplant; cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until tender.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F. Spray an 8-inch square pan with nonstick spray. Layer half the tomatoes and eggplant in the pan; sprinkle with basil. Spread macaroni on top; layer remaining tomato and eggplant over macaroni. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese and paprika. Bake for 20-25 minutes, until bubbly.
Each serving provides: 1 fat, 1 protein, 2 vegetables, 2 breads, 15 calories.
Per serving: 324 calories
Source: Weight Watchers Magazine, June 1993
